summary: Well‑mixed matrix recording with excellent instrument separation and an intense Victim → Foolish transition.
review: The UltraMatrix source provides a clear, well‑balanced sound with strong instrument separation that makes the pre‑drums flow very listenable. Reviewers highlight the three Built to Last era tunes, especially noting the intense transition between Victim and Foolish as a standout moment. Overall the performance is praised despite the lack of detailed star rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review, but it emphasizes good sound quality and a standout song transition, suggesting a solid show with decent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Good overall sound with notable instrument separation; pre‑drums sections described as very listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Positive remarks about the flow before drums and an intense transition between Victim and Foolish; overall enjoyable performance of three Built‑to‑Last era tunes.
